questionHtml: Explain why the compound C2H6O, produced in (b), has a higher boiling point than compound C2H4O, produced in d(i).
markschemeHtml:
C2H6O/ethanol: hydrogen-bonding AND C2H4O/ethanal: no hydrogen-bonding/«only» dipole–dipole forces ✔

hydrogen bonding stronger «than dipole–dipole» ✔

meta.title: Explain why the compound C2H6O, produced in (b), has a higher boiling point than compound C2H4O, produced in d(i).
